UnitAbilities.Title: Emergency Combat Embarkation
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one Adepta Sororitas unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this Transport, it can embark within this Transport.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

UnitAbilities.Title: Consecrated Ground
UnitAbilities.Text: When this Fortification is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1" of another part. Friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this Fortification. While an Adepta Sororitas unit from your army is within 1" of this Fortification, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Holy Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: FORTIFICATION
Infos.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made,
unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battleshocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spiritual Fortitude
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Cult
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

InitalWargear: The Thorn of the White Rose

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of the Emperor’s Wrath
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonbreaker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Daemon unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Weapons.Name: The Thorn of the White Rose

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Command
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Absolver of Sin
UnitAbilities.Text: Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Repentia Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text:
Once per battle, after this model’s unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
Designer’s Note: Place a Cherub token next to the unit once this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Seraphim Squad, Zephyrim Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Divine Authority
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fury of the Righteous
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Laud Hailer
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adepta Sororitas unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shield of the Righteous
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have an invulnerable save of 4+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unflinching Determination
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacred Devotions
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 4.

UnitAbilities.Text: Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Repentia Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Adamant Wrath
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
